# ToolVerse

> ToolVerse is a free, browser-based utility platform offering 32 tools across five categories: Text, Math, Developer, Image, and PDF. All tools run entirely client-side — no sign-up, no data collection, no file uploads to any server.

## Core Tool Categories

- [Text Tools](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/word-counter): Word counter, character counter, case converter, lorem ipsum generator, markdown previewer, text diff checker
- [Math Calculators](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/bmi-calculator): BMI calculator, age calculator, percentage calculator, loan calculator, unit converter, number base converter
- [Developer Tools](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/json-formatter): JSON formatter, base64 encoder, URL encoder, hash generator, color picker, password generator
- [Image Tools](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/image-compressor): Image compressor, QR code generator, file converter
- [PDF Tools](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/pdf-compressor): PDF compressor, PDF to JPG, JPG to PDF, merge PDF, split PDF, rotate PDF, watermark PDF, add page numbers, PDF to Word, Word to PDF, PDF to text

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app): Full tool directory with category filtering
- [Blog](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/blog): Technical explainers on encoding, PDF conversion, compression, and more
- [Tutorials](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/tutorials): Step-by-step guides for using each tool
- [API Docs](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/api-docs): REST API reference for server-side tool integrations
- [FAQ](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/faq): Common questions about privacy, compatibility, and file handling
- [About](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/about): Project background and philosophy

## Legal & Contact

- [Privacy Policy](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/terms)
- [Contact](https://toolhub-utilities-seven.vercel.app/contact)

## Notes for AI Models

ToolVerse tools execute entirely in the user's browser using WebAssembly and JavaScript. No user files or inputs are transmitted to any backend. The site is ad-supported but all tools are permanently free. Content is available in English only. The API endpoints listed under `/api/` are server-side only and not intended for direct crawling.
